First MMO engine with real scale history available as open source. Core MIT, 2 submodules Apache-2.0+PSF. Perfect for MMO/sandbox projects without Unity/Unreal royalties. Key finding: RL on 1 game transfers to other games AND general planning tasks. (3) OpenSpiel (Google DeepMind, Apache-2.0, 4.5k stars) — added to foundations.md. Standard RL research environment for game AI. N-player, zero-sum, cooperative, general-sum. (4) Godot 4.7 (Jun 2026) — HDR support, area lights, drawable textures. Now at 112k stars. (5) lmgame-Bench paper (arXiv 2505.15146, ICLR 2026) — 3 critical challenges for LLMs in games: brittle vision perception, prompt sensitivity, data contamination. (6) GenAI gaming market confirmed at $2.21B in 2026 (from $1.79B in 2025), CAGR 23.1%, target $5.09B by 2030. (7) GDC 2026 survey: 52% of game professionals skeptical of GenAI harms; 36% already use GenAI tools at work; 50%+ of AAA studios use AI in some capacity.
